summary: iter28 Anti-scam Trust Layer (Phase 2) — full E2E coverage. Wrote /app/backend/tests/test_iter28_anti_scam_trust.py (17 tests covering WhatsApp bulk-import parser, can_manage_blocklist perm gating, verify/reject phone, account_status enforcement on /orders + /vip/withdraw + /vip/redeem, login re-check, register default). 17/17 NEW pass + 67/68 RELEVANT PRIOR ITER pass (iter20/21/23/25/26/27). The 1 fail is the same pre-existing iter27 openapi-via-ingress artifact. Frontend Playwright validated: admin bulk-import dialog with counts, reject-phone dialog with reason-length gating, employee perm-toggle (Pendiente vs buttons), under-review-banner + account-blocked-banner visibility per account_status. Admin Verificar/Rechazar still fully functional — no regression.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py at 2880 lines is past the 700-line soft-cap. iter27 already split auth; consider extracting blocked_contacts + verify/reject endpoints to /app/backend/routes/blocklist.py in iter29.
_parse_whatsapp_blocklist correctly handles the real WhatsApp example (5 entries, multi-block, decorator-only lines skipped, reason newline-joined).
_assert_account_active runs AFTER pydantic validation, so malformed bodies get 422 not 403 — acceptable security pattern (validation is stateless).
Permission gating is consistent: admin bypasses, employee needs can_manage_blocklist=True, applied uniformly to list/add/delete/bulk-import/verify-phone/reject-phone.
Login re-check (routes/auth.py L467-477) correctly flips status to under_review on blocklist hit but does NOT block login itself — matches the spec exactly.
Idempotency of reject-phone verified: second call doesn't duplicate the blocked_contacts row.
Dashboard banners gated by role !== admin && role !== employee — staff never see the banners (correct).

success_rate.frontend: 100% (bulk-import dialog, reject-phone gating, employee perm toggle, under-review + blocked banners all PASS)

test_credentials: From /app/memory/test_credentials.md — admin/employee/normal/vip session tokens. Refreshed session expiries during this run.
seed_data_creation: Refreshed 4 user_sessions tokens (30-day TTL). Temporarily toggled employee.can_manage_blocklist between True/False and normal user.account_status between active/under_review/blocked for FE banner tests. All seed mutations were rolled back before finishing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: 1) /app/backend/tests/test_iter28_anti_scam_trust.py is the canonical iter28 regression file. 2) The fixture in that file auto-resets employee.can_manage_blocklist + normal/vip account_status — safe to re-run. 3) When testing account_status enforcement, REMEMBER pydantic validation runs before _assert_account_active — so payloads must be schema-valid to reach the 403 gate (use full body fields). 4) Register endpoint requires `phone` field; emails are normalized to lowercase. 5) The known iter27 openapi-via-ingress test failure is unchanged and unrelated.
rca of the issue: No iter28 bugs. The WhatsApp parser, perm gating, verify/reject, account_status enforcement and login re-check all match the spec. Manual cross-checks: (a) reason field correctly newline-joins the 3 📌 lines, (b) name='Estafador ❌️' mirrored across all 3 phones in the block, (c) bulk-import flips already-registered users to under_review when phone matches (affected_active_accounts>=1), (d) idempotent reject-phone, (e) admin always sees Verificar/Rechazar regardless of can_manage_blocklist.
